detail: audit remediation: 8 fixes — version bump, __main__ guards, legacy cleanup, pin deps, effects tests, I/O handling, CI pipeline, textures split

Add 9 features: mastering chain, stochastic events, granular synthesis, K-weighted LUFS, spectral balance, CLI flags (--vary/--preview/--standalone), field recording script, instrument stem script. 336/336 tests passing.
Fix ruff lint errors: auto-fix imports, add per-file-ignores for scripts E402, fix line length
Remove 2 unused variables (F841): modulation.py t, test_compose.py xf
senior-dev-analyze audit: DRY synth (_normalize_peak), add requirements.lock, update DEC-001 (200→400), fix ARCHITECTURE textures/ + remove live-perf, update SWOT/README/CLAUDE counts
senior-dev-analyze audit: DRY synth (_normalize_peak), add requirements.lock, update DEC-001 limit to 400, fix ARCHITECTURE textures package, update SWOT/README/CLAUDE counts
add V004 layer scripts (bass arpeggio, mid pad, shimmer, mix, binaural)
Phase A+D audiomancer quality pass: pad jitter, soft-clip cascade, auto-resample, multi_lfo, random_walk, density_profile, micro_events + V005 scripts + samples bank
V005 cleanup + fix: rename 33->23 pad_alive, delete 4 exploration scripts, warm_pad delegates to pad_alive with deep chord
config-driven renderer (configs/V005.py + render_stem/render_mix) + piano workflow (record/render_midi/process_piano) + docs resync
roadmap expansion: texture+piano_processed builders, Karplus-Strong, Paulstretch, saturation.py, MIDI live-monitor + quantize
fix(ci): add setuptools find directive in pyproject.toml to exclude configs/ and samples/ from package discovery
CI lint: remove dead return + ruff I001 auto-fix imports, ship gallery_v2 script

10 features: ir_reverb + sidechain + bowed_string + granular pitch_curve + morph_textures builder + delay_pingpong + suggest_eq_cuts + binaural presets extended + viz.py + arpeggio_from_chord + gallery v3
ethnic instruments (didgeridoo/handpan/oud/sitar/derbouka) + sampler (pitch-shift + pitched_pad) + gallery v4
clean inbox/, move firecrack+didgeridoo to samples/cc0/, trim script 53 to real-sample A/B only

V006_test autonomous render — Muladhara root chakra 5:00 stem; 4 new reusable builders (foundation_drone, ochre_pad, sparse_sample_events, subliminal_sine); custom ambient_master because default master_chain maximizes LUFS by +10dB; final mix hits -20.04 LUFS / -8.45 dBTP / 300s / 48kHz PCM_24

V006 canonical: configs/V006.py via render_mix.py --config V006; promoted ambient_master_chain + normalize_lufs_gated + apply_pre_fade to lib; ochre_pad chord=list[(hz,db)]; render scripts read master_mode/ceiling_dbtp/pre_fade_sec/bit_depth from META; tests_v006/ removed; 489 tests pass

V006 alt configs (tidal/ember/cavern) + per-stem density envelopes; tidal=foundation sparse cuts, ember=dual ochre C/Eb opposite phases + harmonic blooms, cavern=breathing foundation + cave brown wash + 4 didge events; all hit -20 LUFS / -3 dBTP / 300s / PCM_24

V006_ember_v2 (removes piercing overtone_whisper 5x/7x/9x sines), V006_warmth (+ evolving_drone A3 mid body), V006_braise (+ breathing_pad C-minor voice) - all 0% energy above 2kHz, -20 LUFS target hit

V006_braise final delivery — mix + 6 stems (foundation/ochre_mid/ochre_minor/breath_pad/didgeridoo/subliminal); all 300.0s / 48kHz / PCM_24 / -20.00 LUFS / TP ≤ -5.5 dBTP; MANIFEST.md in output/V006_braise/ for Akasha handoff
